description: Regression scenarios for file classification reference: ownership categories, agent definition references, and CODE type coverage.

assertions.pattern: CODE section covers source and scripts
assertions.context: CODE category includes source code, scripts, tests, and hooks

assertions.pattern: SPEC section covers features and anchors
assertions.context: SPEC category includes feature specs, design anchors, policy anchors

assertions.pattern: QA-OWNED section covers discoveries and regression
assertions.context: QA-OWNED category includes discovery sidecars and regression JSON
Agent definition delegates file ownership to file_classification.md

assertions.pattern: no inline file pattern lists in mode definitions
assertions.context: No *.py, *.sh etc. in agent definition write-access lines
Dockerfile, Makefile, .github are under CODE section
Skill files are under CODE section
